top3.sql:
SELECT c.CustomerID
FROM customers c
JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
WHERE c.Segment = 'SME' 
  AND strftime('%Y-%m', ym.Date) = '2012-06'
ORDER BY ym.Consumption ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.CustomerID
FROM customers c
JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
WHERE c.Segment = 'SME'
  AND ym.Date BETWEEN '2012-06-01' AND '2012-06-30'
ORDER BY ym.Consumption ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.CustomerID
FROM customers c
JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
WHERE c.Segment = 'SME' 
  AND strftime('%Y-%m', ym.Date) = '2012-06'
ORDER BY ym.Consumption ASC
LIMIT 1;

WITH sme_consumption AS (
  SELECT c.CustomerID, ym.Consumption
  FROM customers c
  JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
  WHERE c.Segment = 'SME'
    AND strftime('%Y-%m', ym.Date) = '2012-06'
)
SELECT CustomerID
FROM sme_consumption
ORDER BY Consumption ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.CustomerID
FROM customers c
JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
WHERE c.Segment = 'SME'
  AND ym.Date BETWEEN '2012-06-01' AND '2012-06-30'
ORDER BY ym.Consumption ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.CustomerID
FROM customers c
JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
WHERE c.Segment = 'SME' 
  AND strftime('%Y-%m', ym.Date) = '2012-06'
ORDER BY ym.Consumption ASC
LIMIT 1;

WITH sme_consumption AS (
  SELECT c.CustomerID, ym.Consumption
  FROM customers c
  JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
  WHERE c.Segment = 'SME'
    AND strftime('%Y-%m', ym.Date) = '2012-06'
)
SELECT CustomerID
FROM sme_consumption
ORDER BY Consumption ASC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT c.CustomerID
FROM customers c
JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
WHERE c.Segment = 'SME'
  AND ym.Date BETWEEN '2012-06-01' AND '2012-06-30'
ORDER BY ym.Consumption ASC
LIMIT 1;

final.sql:
SELECT c.CustomerID
FROM customers c
JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
WHERE c.Segment = 'SME' 
  AND strftime('%Y-%m', ym.Date) = '2012-06'
ORDER BY ym.Consumption ASC
LIMIT 1;
